creator: mzaki@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
GNOME should find window-managers automatically
as described in its documents, but can't.

GNOME realize this feature by a script 'gnome-wm',
and this script realize manual window-manager selection too.

This script requires /bin/bash, crazy.

How-To-Repeat: See $PREFIX/bin/gnome-wm on GNOME-available machines.

It comes from gsm/gnome-wm in gnome-core tar ball.
